message:
fix(swarm): three bug fixes in auto_respawner and limit_detector

1. auto_respawner: Record retry attempts BEFORE respawn, not after success.
   Previously, failed respawns weren't counted toward the retry limit,
   allowing infinite respawn loops on persistent failures.

2. auto_respawner: Check for agent exit immediately in waitForExit().
   Previously, the first check was delayed by one poll interval (500ms),
   adding unnecessary latency when agents exit quickly.

3. limit_detector: Prevent goroutine leaks on repeated Start() calls.
   Previously, calling Start() twice would overwrite the cancel func,
   orphaning the first set of goroutines. Now returns error if already started.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
